title: Critical RCE in gateway
description: Suspected unauthenticated remote code execution on an internet-facing edge gateway host, with anomalous authentication activity.

title: Impossible-travel sign-in for finance user
description: A finance user signed in from two geographically impossible locations within 40 minutes, suggesting credential theft.

title: Anomalous privileged role assignment
description: A service account granted Global Administrator immediately after a failed-signin burst.
